span.p: Round 0 or later round

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Round 0 seed path
resolveLlmTargetFields()
job.requirements + requiredFields + critical_fields

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Later rounds only
computeNeedSet(previous summary/provenance)
then buildNeedSetDispatch()

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Dispatch output
llmTargetFields
extraQueries
escalatedFields

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
buildRoundContext()
missing_required_fields
missing_critical_fields
extra_queries
llm_target_fields

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
runDiscoverySeedPlan()
normalizePlanningHints()

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p: discoverCandidateSources()

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
missingFields = normalize(
planningHints.missingRequiredFields +
planningHints.missingCriticalFields +
job.requirements.llmTargetFields,
fieldOrder)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Brand resolution
cache -> optional triage LLM ->
officialDomain + aliases + supportDomain

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
manufacturerAutoPromote?
mutate categoryConfig.sourceHosts
sourceHostMap + sourceRegistry

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Learning artifacts + caps
profileMaxQueries = max(6, discoveryMaxQueries * 2)
caps from searchProfileCapMap

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
buildSearchProfile()
job
categoryConfig
missingFields
enrichedLexicon
learning.queryTemplates
brandResolution
maxQueries + caps

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
identity = brand/model/variant/category
base_templates = categoryConfig.searchTemplates
focus_fields = normalize(missingFields by fieldOrder)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
identity_aliases = buildDeterministicAliases(aliasValidationCap)
variant_guard_terms

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: brandResolutionHints = officialDomain first + aliases

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
buildQueryRows() per focus field
search_hints.query_terms
search_hints.domain_hints
search_hints.preferred_content_types
ui.tooltip_md gate
learned lexicon + learned queries

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
selectManufacturerHosts()
filters manufacturer sourceHosts using brand + domain hints

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
selectedQueries = base_templates + interleaved query rows
fallback if none
final cap = maxQueries

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Search Profile output
17 top-level keys
queries
query_rows
focus_fields
identity_aliases
variant_guard_terms
field_target_queries
doc_hint_queries

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
extraQueries bypass buildSearchProfile()
merged later in searchDiscovery
